title: senecio eupatorioides
intro: Senecio eupatorioides, also known as White Ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Americas. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and to stimulate digestion. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and treating fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. White Ragwort can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions.
